title: hydrocotyle triflora
intro: Hydrocotyle triflora, also known as Gotu Kola, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the mint family and is native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Hydrocotyle triflora include improving cognitive function, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting skin and hair health. Hydrocotyle triflora is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, which can be used to support overall well-being and improve mental clarity.
